_comment: Inline node code defined on the entity. mode=exec + runtime=node + spec.code -> each request runs `node /app/index.js` with the request envelope on stdin (stdin JSON -> stdout JSON). spec.dependencies are npm install-ed once at provisioning. Use the smolvm-node-keepalive image (FROM node:22-alpine, CMD sleep infinity).
name: node inline code
description: Runs JS baked on the entity, with an npm dependency
